stemHtml: A twin-engine turbo-propeller aircraft has a maximum certified Take-off Mass exceeding 8618 kg and a maximum approved seating configuration of more than 19 passengers. According to the AIR OPS rules, the route of the described aircraft must be planned in such a way that on one engine an appropriate aerodrome can be reached within…

options.a: 120 minutes at the cruise speed, one engine inoperative.
options.b: 90 minutes at the cruise speed, one engine inoperative.
options.c: 60 minutes at the cruise speed, one engine inoperative.
options.d: 30 minutes at the cruise speed, one engine inoperative.
